name: You Hate Parsnips?
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and boil parsnips until tender.
2. Put through a sieve to create a smooth puree.
3. Add flour, curry powder, salt, and pepper, along with well-beaten eggs and melted butter.
4. Mix until the mixture is quite smooth.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into very hot butter.
6. Fry until light brown, turning once.
7. Serve with boiled rice and enjoy the hot brown gravy.
